title: Improve save+reload UX — avoid unnecessary disk re-reads

questions.prompt: What approach should we take for in-memory vs disk reads?
questions.description: Currently every sidebar click re-reads all track files from disk. The proposed fix keeps all tracks in memory and filters by album at render time.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Keep all tracks in memory, filter at render time. Only re-read from disk after bulk operations (auto-tag, audit) or explicit refresh.

options.label: In-memory filter — load once, navigate instantly
Lazy load — only load tracks when album is clicked (but not on every navigation)

questions.prompt: After auto-tag/audit, how should we refresh?
questions.description: Auto-tag writes new metadata to disk. Currently it re-scans the entire library. We could re-read only the albums that were modified.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Re-read only modified albums from disk

questions.prompt: Should we add a manual refresh button/keyboard shortcut?
questions.description: If navigation is instant (no disk reads), users need a way to force a re-scan when files change externally (e.g., copied via Finder).
questions.recommendedAnswer: Add a refresh button in the sidebar or title bar, and bind Cmd+R / Ctrl+R to trigger a full re-scan

options.label: Yes — add a refresh button + keyboard shortcut
No — keep auto-detection on visibility change

questions.prompt: When clicking an album in the sidebar, what should happen?
questions.description: Currently it re-reads from disk with scanning=true. With in-memory filtering, navigation is instant. Should we still show a brief loading indicator?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Instant switch — no loading state at all for in-memory navigation

options.label: Instant — no loading indicator for navigation
Subtle spinner in sidebar only (no full progress bar)

questions.prompt: After saving a single track's metadata, should we do anything extra?
questions.description: Currently we do an optimistic update + API write. The view is already up-to-date. No extra reload is needed.
questions.recommendedAnswer: No reload after save — optimistic update is sufficient. Only refresh cover art if album/title changed (already done).

options.label: No reload — optimistic update is enough
Re-read the modified track from disk after save

questions.prompt: What is the scope of this change?
questions.description: The core change is making sidebar navigation filter in-memory instead of re-reading from disk. What related changes should be included?
questions.recommendedAnswer: In-memory navigation + scoped auto-tag reload + refresh button

options.label: In-memory navigation only (no disk re-read on album click)
Manual refresh button for re-scanning on demand
Fix save UX — show saving progress clearly, don't block navigation
